MetLife Stadium.transit: The Meadowlands Rail Line connects Secaucus Junction to the MetLife Sports Complex station, located near Gate C. Express shuttle buses run from Port Authority Terminal. Ride-share drop-off is in Lot E.
MetLife Stadium.accessibility: Wheelchair-accessible seating is distributed across all levels. Gate C and Gate D feature dedicated ADA entries with elevators to upper levels. Complimentary wheelchair escorts are available at Guest Services booths.
MetLife Stadium.dining: Concessions at Section 120 and Gate D offer vegetarian, halal, and gluten-free choices. Local specialty items like New York style hot dogs are found in Sections 117 and 142.
MetLife Stadium.family_services: Baby diaper-changing facilities are present in all family restrooms located near Sections 104, 124, 208, and 318. A dedicated nursing suite is located on the Plaza level next to Gate B Guest Services.

Estadio Azteca.transit: The Tren Ligero (Light Rail) connects from Metro Tasqueña directly to the Estadio Azteca station. Taxis and official ride-shares drop off at the Calzada de Tlalpan entrance.
Estadio Azteca.accessibility: Gate 3 features dedicated accessibility ramps and elevator access serving wheelchair spaces in the lower sections (100-115). Visual aids and sensory guides are available at the main Information desk.
Estadio Azteca.dining: Traditional Mexican snacks and concessions are available at Sections 108 and 224. Certified water refill stations are set up near the main entry gates to encourage reusable bottle usage.
Estadio Azteca.family_services: Family restrooms equipped with changing tables are situated at the East and West concourse entries. A baby nursing pod is located near the VIP gate entrance on the ground floor.

BC Place.transit: The Expo Line SkyTrain stops at Stadium-Chinatown station, a 5-minute walk to Gate H. Buses 2, 17, and 22 stop along Georgia Street. Bicycle parking is free at Gate F.
BC Place.accessibility: Ramp access is located at Gate A and Gate H. Elevators inside Gate A serve all suites and upper concourse decks. Assistive listening devices (ALDs) can be rented at Section 104 Guest Services.
BC Place.dining: BC Place offers diverse local cuisine including Pacific Northwest seafood options at Section 112 and vegan/gluten-free kiosks at Sections 103 and 137.
BC Place.family_services: All restrooms are equipped with infant changing tables. A private, quiet nursing room is available behind Section 111, equipped with comfortable seating and electrical outlets.
